calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement (Ccp Sec. 664.6)
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SHAUNAK SAYTA'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT (CCP SEC. 664.6).

Appearances: Alex Lemieux (805.341.8784) for plaintiff and moving party; David J. Foran of Sacramento and Foran (415.775.0891) for defendant and responding party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. The court finds there is no violation of the agreement: (a) the moving party failed to notify the rent board of the settlement agreement; (b) the moving party failed to stipulate to sealing the records with the rent board. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shaunak Sayta, Esq. (415-905-0887) Plaintiff/Moving party in Pro Per through Court Call.
David Foran, Esq. (415-775-0891) of Sacramento and Foran for Defendant/opposing party Edmund Chu.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Argued specificity.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHAUNAK SAYTA's Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff has failed to meet his burden to demonstrate, with specificity, what information he contends is subject to the right of privacy, and how sealing will protect that right. (See C.R.C., Rule 2.550(d).) Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Plaintiffs Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal

PLAINTIFF SHAUNAK SAYTA'S Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. Judge Rebbeca A Wiseman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
